default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss ongoing projects, client updates, and team responsibilities.](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aida to lead editorial calls and partnerships for new accounts, starting with Monograph and Metronome](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Airbyte focus shifting to aggressive content refresh (5x volume) rather than new editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Interwell strategy needs formal buy-in; projections and template recommendations due today](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Biologica likely to continue past week 8; focus on confirming intent and discussing post-launch strategy](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure and Responsibilities

  - [Aida taking lead on editorial calls and partnerships for new accounts](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Goal: Set scalable process and create repeatable pieces](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Sydney and Joe to continue generating artifacts and establishing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Emphasis on building strong client relationships and getting quality inputs](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Client Updates

#### Monograph and Metronome

  - [Aida getting up to speed on these accounts](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Metronome: Waiting on response to pull meeting forward](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up with Chris (Metronome) in person](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

#### Airbyte

  - [Shifting focus to aggressive content refresh (50-100/month to 5x volume)](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [George preparing contract for upsell (9/month to 30/month)](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Refresh priority over new editorial content due to existing low-quality pages](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

#### Interwell

  - [Meeting tomorrow to get formal buy-in on strategy](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Dave to send projections on content scaling and CAC impact by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Need alignment on template for 250 ketamine pages](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Outstanding invoices to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

#### Biologica

  - [Likely to continue past week 8](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Focus on confirming intent to continue and discussing post-launch strategy](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Aida generated 17 new assignments; Sadira to upload to content OS](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

#### Hypergrowth

  - [Live meeting tomorrow in office](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Marcel to take more lead](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Waiting on feedback for calibration blog](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Custom workflows still needed from dev team](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

#### Town

  - [One blog ready to publish; Sadira to stage in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Aida meeting with tax team member for SME insights](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

#### Augment Code

  - [Calibration blog feedback received](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Code library part of experimentation lane, not immediate priority](https://fathom.video/share/FHDWXQkJ4x6xpz753F228byHze7YdKHC?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)

## Next Steps

  - Aida: Get up to speed on Monograph and Metronome accounts
  - Sydney: Follow up with Metronome if no response by later today
  - George: Finalize Airbyte contract for upsell
  - Dave: Send Interwell projections and template recommendations by end of day
  - Sadira: Upload Biologica assignments to content OS by tomorrow
  - Joe: Set up time with Daryl (Engine) this week
  - Sadira: Stage Town blog in CMS
  - Team: Continue focus on website content for Augment Code, treat code library as part of experimentation lane

action_items.description: Follow up with Metronome re: pulling forward meeting if no response by EOD
Share message to Airbyte proposing contract increase from 9 to 30 articles/month
Send Interwell projections on content scaling impact on CAC by EOD
Make recommendation on template for 250 ketamine pages for Interwell by EOD
Upload 17 new Biologica assignments to content OS from Atlas. Format, fix, and organize into topic clusters.
Stage ready blog post in Town's CMS (await details from Aida)
